localizations.title: Attack on the Grand Express
localizations.hint_1: Look carefully at the train to find out how to continue your adventure.
localizations.hint_2: There is only one exit to the outside.
localizations.hint_5: Barnes will not hesitate to take you down. Act swiftly!
localizations.hint_15: To barricade yourself in, you can use a piece of heavy furniture.
localizations.hint_17: You must find a way to open the padlock.
localizations.hint_22: Use something made of fabric to put out the fire.
localizations.hint_40: The train is fast, but you have a horse.
localizations.hint_50: One of the cars has a feature that will make it easier to pull yourself up.
localizations.hint_60: You have no time to search but, instead, this bookcase will provide an excellent barricade.
localizations.hint_66_first: Barnes wrote the combination down on the papers you saved from the fire.
localizations.hint_66: The papers seem to refer to specific elements of the painting. Their directions are important.
localizations.hint_75: By moving the bookcase, a hidden item on the wall is revealed.
localizations.hint_90: You have triggered an opening mechanism. The safe must be hidden behind one of the objects in the car.
localizations.hint_99: Your loyal Diablo must still be nearby. Find a way to call him.
localizations.answer_hint_1: One of the train windows has a hidden number.
localizations.answer_hint_2: Access Machine 20 (the colt), aim at the window, then shoot.
localizations.answer_hint_5: Access Machine 20 (the colt) and aim at your opponent.
localizations.answer_hint_15: Place the bookcase (60) against the door (15).
localizations.answer_hint_17: Access Machine 20 (the colt), aim at the padlock, then shoot.
localizations.answer_hint_22: Use your scarf (30) to put out the fire (22).
localizations.answer_hint_40: Add Diablo (10) to the card with the train (40).
localizations.answer_hint_50: The central car (+7) has a ladder. Lead Diablo there.
localizations.answer_hint_66: Each element points in a direction to be reproduced on the safe. First the twig (11), then the fist (9), and finally the sword (5).
localizations.answer_hint_75: Observe the left wall, where the bookcase was. There is a hidden number (90).
localizations.answer_hint_90: Add Modifier (+11) to the painting (55) to access the safe.
localizations.answer_hint_99: If you whistle, Diablo will come running.
localizations.machine_66: You find the documents. A note implicates a member of the Baker family in the theft...
localizations.machine_99: Responding to your call, Diablo appears under the window. You jump from the train onto him before disappearing at full gallop. Barnes' cry of rage reaches your ears as you return to town, the valuable concessions in your pocket. Victory!
localizations.card_17: You slip into the car, hoping no one notices.
localizations.machine_20_card_2_hint: How can you exit the car?
localizations.machine_20_card_2_answer: Shoot at the window to escape.
localizations.machine_20_card_5_hint: How can you threaten him without hurting him?
localizations.machine_20_card_17_hint: What is blocking the service hatch?
localizations.machine_20_card_17_answer: Shoot at the padlock to open the service hatch.
localizations.answer_hint_99_noMic: Touch the screen when Diablo whinnies and he will come to your rescue.
